states.name: Murasaki Shikibu
states.title: Weaver of Tales
states.description: Murasaki Shikibu was unmatched in her pursuit of knowledge from a very young age. Once she reached adulthood, her erudition was noticed by a certain powerful aristocrat, and he made her his daughter's tutor. While she held that position, her novel The Tale of Genji reached a million characters in length, and attained the status of a masterpiece.

states.name: Murasaki Shikibu
states.title: Weaver of Tales
states.description: Murasaki finished writing her magnum opus earlier than most historians believe, and her life was shorter than they assume as well. She faced death with a single regret in her heart: the fact that The Tale of Genji was the only work she ever completed.

states.name: Murasaki Shikibu
states.title: Weaver of Tales
states.description: However, Murasaki's creativity hadn't escaped the notice of a certain Primordial, and when her final moments approached, she was offered a new life as an Avatar. She accepted it with gratitude—for as long as she is alive, she can continue spinning tales of love.
